name: Moltar
bio: Moltar was not born—he was forged. A result of Grallok's sacrifice to seal Zornath, Moltar emerged as a towering creature of obsidian, magma, and sorrow. With a molten core and fists that shattered mountains, Moltar retained fragments of Grallok's memories, twisted into blind loyalty. When Dreyfus claimed power in the afterlife, Moltar followed, acting as a volcanic shield for the Demon King. Neither good nor evil, Moltar was pure force—an echo of an old warrior's final act twisted into endless rage. He was a monument to what happens when even the noblest sacrifices are corrupted by the wrong hands.
A war-golem forged by Dreyfus from the remains of Grallok, fighting in the final clash of kings.
